title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 45
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a lost keys.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Did you find your keys? You sounded worried this morning. || Girl: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the gym locker, because I remembered putting my bag away. || Woman: And did you check the bike basket? You were there later. || Girl: I did, but it was not there. Then my brother called and said [1]my keys were in my jacket pocket[/1]. I must have left it there without thinking. || Woman: Good. You would need it today. || Girl: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Did you find your keys? You sounded worried this morning.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but not where I expected. I went back to the gym locker, because I remembered putting my bag away.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: And did you check the bike basket? You were there later.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I did, but it was not there. Then my brother called and said my keys were in my jacket pocket. I must have left it there without thinking.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Good. You would need it today.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Exactly, so I will collect it soon.

questions.question: Where is the keys?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, keys inside an open gym locker, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, keys inside a jacket pocket, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, keys in a bicycle basket, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The speaker says my keys were in my jacket pocket.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans for the afternoon.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to go skating this afternoon? I was looking forward to it. || Boy: I don't think so. The ice rink is closed, so that plan will not work. || Man: We could visit the museum instead. || Boy: I checked, but we went last month. My cousin suggested another idea, and [1]we are playing table tennis after school[/1]. || Man: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet? || Boy: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together. || Boy: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The ice rink is closed, so that plan will not work.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: We could visit the museum instead.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: I checked, but we went last month. My cousin suggested another idea, and we are playing table tennis after school.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That sounds fine. What time shall we meet?

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Let's meet at four outside the station, and we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about the swimming lesson.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What do we need to take for the swimming lesson tomorrow? I don't want to carry too much. || Man: The teacher said we do not need to bring a cap, because they have enough for everybody. || Woman: What about a water bottle? || Man: No, not this time. The important thing is this: [1]bring a towel because students cannot borrow towels there[/1]. || Woman: Thanks. I will put it in my bag tonight. || Man: Good idea. We have to leave early, so do not forget it. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food in a café.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you decided what to get for lunch? The queue is moving quickly. || Woman: I first thought about pancakes, but they are only for breakfast. || Man: The burger looks good too. || Woman: Maybe, but it is too big. I think [1]I will have the omelette because it comes with vegetables[/1]. || Man: Good choice. I will order after you. || Woman: Great, then we can find a table near the window before it gets busy. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier. || Woman: Please remember this, because there may not be another message.

questions.context: You hear a school announcement about the basketball practice.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: This is a message for students joining the basketball practice today. Please do not go to the sports hall, because the floor is wet. Some students may wait by the outside court, but rain is expected. The teacher has changed the room for today only. [1]Everyone should go straight to the gym classroom after lunch[/1]. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: This is a message for students joining the basketball practice today. Please do not go to the sports hall, because the floor is wet. Some students may wait by the outside court, but rain is expected. The teacher has changed the room for today only. Everyone should go straight to the gym classroom after lunch. Please arrive on time, because the activity will begin as soon as the register is checked. You do not need to bring any extra equipment.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the library.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the library tomorrow? I thought you were going to take the bus. || Woman: I was, but the bus drivers are on strike. || Man: Could you use going by bike instead? || Woman: I checked, but the roads are too busy. [1]I am going to walk because it is just across the park[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Woman: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Woman: That should make the rest of the day much easier.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about work in a supermarket.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What are you doing at the supermarket this afternoon? I thought the manager asked you to stack fruit. || Man: Not now, because the delivery is late. || Woman: So will you work at the till? || Man: No, another assistant is there. The manager said [1]my job today is to check stock on the shelves[/1]. || Woman: That sounds clear enough. || Man: Yes, and it should not take too long if the shop stays quiet. I can help you afterwards. || Man: That should make the rest of the day much easier.
